proposal_summary: Funding True Names Ltd with an evergreen grant stream of $11,500 USDC daily, backdated to January 1st, 2022, to support the development of the ENS Protocol.

disclosed_entities.name: True Names Ltd
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: True Names Ltd (“TNL”) developed the Ethereum Name Service (“ENS”) protocol... True Names Ltd respectfully requests an evergreen grant stream

disclosed_entities.name: ENS DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: TNL initiated the creation of the ENS DAO

disclosed_entities.name: USDC
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: For Calendar Year 2022, this request will amount to $4,197,500 USDC which is equivalent to a daily stream of $11,500 USDC.

disclosed_entities.name: Token streaming contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: approving a dedicated token streaming contract at 0xB1377e4f32e6746444970823D5506F98f5A04201 to spend USDC on behalf of the DAO

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: token streaming contract at 0xB1377e4f32e6746444970823D5506F98f5A04201 to spend USDC

claimed_actions.raw_action: approve a daily grant of $11,500 USDC to True Names Ltd
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: allows the dedicated token streaming contract to spend USDC on behalf of the DAO
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This will be accomplished by approving a dedicated token streaming contract at 0xB1377e4f32e6746444970823D5506F98f5A04201 to spend USDC on behalf of the DAO.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal involves a single approval transaction to a streaming contract.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This will be accomplished by approving a dedicated token streaming contract at 0xB1377e4f32e6746444970823D5506F98f5A04201 to spend USDC on behalf of the DAO.

limitations: No specific function names are provided in the text, only a plain English description of approval.
